en_title: Subnautica 2 Developer's Entire Staff Get Their Bonuses After Krafton Agrees to Settlement, but CEO Steps Down
cn_title: 《深海迷航2》团队全员获奖金，Krafton和解但CEO离职
subtitle: 奖金保住了
opus_summary: Krafton与Unknown Worlds管理层达成和解，《深海迷航2》全体员工将获得奖金，但CEO Ted Gill已离职。双方同意撤销所有待决法律程序，游戏仍由Unknown Worlds继续开发。

paragraphs.en: The entire staff of Subnautica 2 developer Unknown Worlds will get their bonuses after parent company Krafton reached a settlement with studio leadership.
paragraphs.cn: 在母公司Krafton与工作室管理层达成和解后，《深海迷航2》开发商Unknown Worlds的全体员工都将拿到奖金。

paragraphs.en: Bloomberg reported that as part of the settlement, Unknown Worlds CEO Ted Gill had stepped down, leaving the company to look for a new boss.
paragraphs.cn: 彭博社报道称，作为和解的一部分，Unknown Worlds CEO Ted Gill已经离职，公司将寻找新的负责人。

paragraphs.en: In a statement provided to IGN, Krafton confirmed the settlement, insisting its focus now was on the future of Subnautica 2, which Unknown Worlds will continue to develop,
paragraphs.cn: Krafton在提供给IGN的一份声明中确认了和解，并坚称公司现在的重点是《深海迷航2》的未来，该作仍将由Unknown Worlds继续开发。

paragraphs.en: "Krafton, Inc., Unknown Worlds Entertainment and Ted Gill, Charlie Cleveland, and Max McGuire have reached a mutual settlement and agreed to dismiss all pending legal proceedings," Krafton said. "Unknown Worlds and Krafton are focused on supporting Subnautica 2, its Early Access journey to the full 1.0 release and the global community that has made the franchise so special. Unknown Worlds will continue leading development, with Krafton providing support for the success of the game."
paragraphs.cn: Krafton表示：「Krafton, Inc.、Unknown Worlds Entertainment以及Ted Gill、Charlie Cleveland和Max McGuire已经达成共同和解，并同意撤销所有待决法律程序。Unknown Worlds和Krafton将专注于支持《深海迷航2》、它从抢先体验走向完整1.0版本的旅程，以及让这个系列如此特别的全球社区。Unknown Worlds将继续主导开发，Krafton则为游戏成功提供支持。」

paragraphs.en: The underwater adventure has sold a mammoth 4 million copies since its early access launch on May 14, achieving more than 467,000 peak concurrent players on Steam. But its development was turbulent, with Krafton firing Gill and co-founders Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire in the summer of last year. At the time, Krafton said the game's launch had also been delayed — something it blamed on Gill — even though its team had been working towards an early access release that would have seen them eligible for a $250 million bonus .
paragraphs.cn: 这款水下冒险游戏自5月14日抢先体验上线以来，已经卖出惊人的400万份，并在Steam上达到超过46.7万名同时在线玩家峰值。但它的开发过程并不平静，Krafton在去年夏天解雇了Gill以及联合创始人Charlie Cleveland和Max McGuire。当时，Krafton还表示游戏发售延期，并将责任归咎于Gill，尽管团队一直朝着一个能让他们有资格获得2.5亿美元（约合人民币18亿元）奖金的抢先体验发布时间推进。

paragraphs.en: Gill and the co-founders immediately launched a lawsuit against Krafton, suggesting they were ousted to avoid that bonus being paid, while Krafton hit back and said the fired staff had "resorted to litigation to demand a multimillion-dollar payout they haven't earned." Krafton also accused them of stealing documents in anticipation of subsequent legal action, muddying the waters over their exit.
paragraphs.cn: Gill和几位联合创始人随即对Krafton提起诉讼，暗示他们被赶走是为了避免支付这笔奖金。Krafton则反击称，被解雇的员工「诉诸诉讼，要求一笔他们没有赚到的数百万美元赔偿」。Krafton还指控他们为后续法律行动窃取文件，让他们离职一事更加混乱。

paragraphs.en: But in March, Krafton was ordered to reinstate Gill and extend the proposed $250 million bonus to staff in one of the most dramatic legal rulings the video game industry had ever seen.
paragraphs.cn: 但在3月，Krafton被勒令恢复Gill职务，并将拟议中的2.5亿美元（约合人民币17亿元）奖金扩展给员工。这是游戏行业有史以来最戏剧化的法律裁决之一。

paragraphs.en: The legal battle revealed a number of shocking revelations around the South Korean company’s internal actions in the run up to Subnautica 2’s release. For example, as internal projections showed Subnautica 2 looked on course to trigger the earnout, Krafton’s chief executive, Changhan Kim, believed it was a “bad deal” and felt “taken advantage of,” according to the ruling.
paragraphs.cn: 这场法律战揭露了这家韩国公司在《深海迷航2》发售前夕一系列令人震惊的内部行动。举例来说，裁决显示，当内部预测显示《深海迷航2》有望触发收益分成时，Krafton首席执行官金昌汉认为这是一笔「糟糕的交易」，并觉得自己「被占了便宜」。

paragraphs.en: Kim was warned by his legal department that the earnout would still need to be paid even if there was a “dismissal with cause” of the Unknown Worlds’ leadership. He was also warned it would expose Krafton to “lawsuit and reputation risk.”
paragraphs.cn: 他的法务部门警告他，即便Unknown Worlds领导层是「有因解雇」，这笔收益分成仍然需要支付。他还被警告，这会让Krafton暴露在「诉讼和声誉风险」之下。

paragraphs.en: Kim then turned to ChatGPT, the AI-powered chatbot built by OpenAI, for help, vice-chancellor Lori Will of the court of chancery in Delaware said in the ruling. ChatGPT initially responded that the earnout would be “difficult to cancel,” but later, at ChatGPT’s suggestion, Kim formed an internal taskforce, dubbed Project X. “The task force’s mandate was to either negotiate a ‘deal’ on the earnout or execute a ‘takeover’ of Unknown Worlds,” Will stated. “They looked to buy time.”
paragraphs.cn: 特拉华州衡平法院副院长Lori Will在裁决中表示，金昌汉随后转向由OpenAI打造的AI聊天机器人ChatGPT寻求帮助。ChatGPT起初回答称，收益分成将「很难取消」，但后来在ChatGPT建议下，金昌汉组建了一个名为Project X的内部工作组。Will写道：「该工作组的任务，是要么就收益分成谈判出一个‘交易’，要么执行对Unknown Worlds的‘接管’。他们试图争取时间。」

paragraphs.en: “Over the next month, Krafton followed most of ChatGPT’s recommendations,” Will wrote.
paragraphs.cn: Will写道：「接下来一个月里，Krafton遵循了ChatGPT的大部分建议。」

paragraphs.en: Development of Subnautica 2 continues as Unknown Worlds works through its plan to update the game throughout early access. The developer has confirmed plans to add a new vehicle and new region centred around the Collector Leviathan, but don't expect to ever be able to directly kill fish .
paragraphs.cn: 随着Unknown Worlds按计划在抢先体验期间持续更新游戏，《深海迷航2》的开发仍在继续。开发商已经确认计划加入一种新载具，以及围绕Collector Leviathan展开的新区域，但不要期待玩家有朝一日能直接杀鱼。

pending_dict.note: 游戏内生物名，暂无稳定中文译名，暂保留英文。
